star_1.text: bad game barely any levels I beat the game in one day. with all coins on every level boo game bad.

Watching an advert for a reward has a high chance to lock you in to *two* adverts back to back to get *one* reward. Then there's one advert that seems like a normal advert, but when it ends it locks you into the game it was advertising no matter how long you afk on the "advert"; had to close Geometry Dash Meltdown and reopen it to not play the completely unrelated game from the "advert" — and wasn't even given the reward that we watched the ad for!!

I love the game but i'm left with no other choice than to rate it one star. The music and the levels are really nice but at some point the whole game gets very slow and the musik continues but the cube is really slow like as if it's freezing. And THAT destroys my whole gameplay. Now you must be thinking it's probably my phone. It can't be. My phone is new. But i still hope you enjoy the game.

The game was... Fine. It has some interesting ideas. Then the "ADS". Should you devote your time to seeing these "ads"? I put quotes there... Because, it makes you play them when I wanna move onto Airborne Robots. Roblox ad was the last one I wanted to see. First, it showed an TikTok, and then it showed an "Are you interested?" Screen, I selected "Not interested" then it thanked me. I DO NOT CARE ABT SCHLEP. I WANNA PLAY GEOMETRY DASH! Uninstalled until I want to play again.

this was one of the worst games ever.. the levels and music are nice. its just the CONSTANT ADS. Every single time I die in this game. there's always a stupid ad. Just fix this so there's no ads. like no I dont want to buy temu.

This game has great graphics and visuals, but the controls suck. Nothing happens when I try and jump, unless I hold the screen, but then I continue bouncing and crash. For anybody looking for a game with controls that really work, this is not the game for you.

Just like all the others this game has literally no sync whatsoever and has ads EVERYWHERE. 30 second unskippable ads every 2 times you die as well as big ads that cover the screen and lag the game a lot. The gameplay itself is like I said super out of sync and very laggy. This is a waste of space just don't get this.

the game its self is fun, but it sometimes will slow the speed of the game right before a jump messing you up and the slowed speed is never in the same spotm I find my game is slowed about 40% of the time, and its not because of any conection issues. personally i would't ever rocomend the game to somone who enjoys a fair game.

I love this game but there's one problem there is some bugs like it always stops working and then it works again and then I suddenly die and the second bug is that every time I have practice mode and then I lose in the practice mode but then it does not reset how I move because every time I reset to the place where I left off then I jump automatically even though I'm not pressing anything and the first issue of the game is that I see only there levels

This game, is waaaaaaaay too easy. I completed the levels 1st try and i didn't even have to concentrate. As a Geometry Dash veteran can i not recommend this game. But if you're just starting out and want to complete some VERY easy levels feel free to try it out. :)
This would be a great game if it weren't for the ads, every second time I fail a level I get a 15-30 second ad!

I can't seem to figure out the reason as to why my music won't work. It was working fine when I first downloaded it but then it froze and now the music won't work at all. I reinstalled twice, and restarted my phone. My volume is at max and I still can't figure it out.

The game wasn't even working properly. Delayed jump and controls were slow. 30 second ads came up without possibility of skipping even with no internet. Don't get this game. It will make your life hell. The rest of these reviews are from the owners of the game.
This game lags, pauses right before I have to jump, has adds that pop up right in the middle of the game, and sometimes doesn't even do the motion when I tap. Thank yoy for listening to my TED talk.

This game is too hard and also it hasnt got much geometry to it! What happened to the advanced shapes like hexagons,pentagons,octagons etc overall i dont recommend because its a game that you find very hard to win and its very irritating it took me 435 tries to beat the seven seas song! 😒

This game was so easy that if I was having trouble sleeping, I would play this game and fall asleep within 1 or 2 minutes. I only have about 10 minute game time on this, because that's how long it took to beat it. Normal and practice mode. You guys are just getting lazy.

A great game. Shame that their support and account team are not good on customer support. Sons's phone phished and money spent against son's account.  Other devs have refunded already. Nothing from these guys despite chasing for over a week. Steer clear of them and be warned. They are only interested in your money whether they get it legally or not.

Hate that it happened to me because it was so hard that i couldn't even beat all 3 of the levels.Get out of the shop right now because it was so awkward to be playing this game.2/10 ungrateful this game is so trash.I do not like this game.GET OUT OF THE SHOP RIGHT NOW BECAUSE IT IS A VERY IMPOSSIBLE DECISION TO DO THIS GAME BECAUSE IT IS ANNOYING!

There are only three levels which in my opinion aren't that entertaining most of the gameplay is repetitive and lazy. You would expect a geometry dash game released in late 2015 should have advanced mechanics such as the ones in the original geometry dash extension but no also the decoration is ok. The only good level i would say is viking arena because gameplay and decoration is actually good. Would suggest getting the original geometry dash game or world and subzerodue to better gameplay imo

I give it 2 stars because it has good levels and good music but I kept getting ads while I was in the middle of levels. The ads really make the game bad so if you're thinking about getting this game then don't unless you want random annoying ads in the middle of you trying to do a level

The main reason why I'm rating this so low is after you've finished the levels, there is nearly nothing left to do. The levels also are too easy to pack into just one game, I feel that they would've worked better if they were added on to Subzero or something.

the game itself is okay but the amount of ads are horrendous. at the top of the screen there's an ad that's ~1/3 of the screen width making it extremely difficult to play well. I wouldn't recommend this game to anyone pahaha

I don't know why but every 2 - 4 minutes the game freezes and my screen turns black. However my device only has issues with this certain game. PLEASE FIX THIS GLITCH. Edit: This bug also happens on other geometry dash games.

It is a rage game, I know, but it has this FEELING of satisfaction when you win, and you feel great... although it wastes your time. Great time, but you shouldn't download unless you have a lot of time on your hands

Geometry Dash is a good game. This is a geometry dash game. But I wish there was an option to turn off ads for people that bought the full version of the game or I wish full version of the game had these levels in it. I do not wanna watch ads for the game that I bought.

Look geometry dash is one of the legend in good parcoure games.🤯 it has so many games.😮but thats not all because the currency original game there are the most epic skins in this game series and each level has different epic music 🎶 and you can colour your skin .😊 thanks.
I was surprised there was even a free version of a game as good as this, but this version lacks half the things of basic geometry dash. Do not recommend, and I love the normal geometry dash

star_3.text: Over all its pretty fun. The songs are good and the design of the levles are beautiful. For me tho, the levels were painfully easy. i had them beat before the end of the day. I was also a little disappointed when i found out there were only three unless you got the full verson. i may have only thought they were easy because I am a seasoned Geometry Dash player, but for a newbie, Id say this game is a good start.
Cool game i just think the levels are to easy it could use more of the new mechanics and some improved gameplay

Overall these 3 levels are pretty good the fact that you can't play them in the full version without ads is quite annoying. I found out you can link your full account to this game which allows you to gain cosmetics and bring it over to the full edition but I would reccomend making it so if you link an account from the full version you don't have ads because you've already paid for no ads, it even markets it that way in the game.
It's pretty easy, not bad if you wanna get the cubes for the vase game
it's good, I just feel like there's too many ads
very good, but need more levels.
adds locked at 45 fps but the music is goood

for a demo of what the real game is like, i don't think it does it's job very well. the levels in Meltdown are of higher quality and difficulty than the first few levels in the full game. I suggest you play Meltdown along side the full game, play the levels in order of difficulty and alternate between games. because if you beat Meltdown before getting the full game, then the first few levels will be boring and feel slow, there will be the same problem if you beat the full game first

I found this app entertaining at first but as I began to beat the levels I realised that there was only three levels. If you want a game that is quick and a bit challenging then this this game is good. If your looking for a game you can play for a longer time with lots of levels, I would recommend geometry dash lite or geometry dash world. This game would really benefit from some more levels and some more updates from the developers in general.

all around really like the game but there's not enough like levels and there's other geometry dashes that are a little bit better because they have a lot of levels and they get really hard and progressively better and this one only has three and I've been waiting for 5 years for the coming soon levels and it's just not that good I would like to give you a 5 stars but the games kind of mid

they took away the animation of getting the secret key in viking arena and removed the animation that shows the hill being unlocked. they also have everything else locked meaning I can't get skin colors or skins. please pay some love to this game it's by far my favorite one besides subzero. if not then please at least make the skins and colors free this games has been out for years and the original is getting more love than this one is.

If I'm being honest, this game is bad and good. It has lots of ads ones u die 3 to 5 times. Although the game play is easy and fun. Very enjoyable, but only 3 levels is kinda boring. You have to download the other versions like subzero, world, and lite versions so you can get more fun and good levels. I'll rate this one 3, very bad but very NOT terrible for a mobile game.

Not bad. Levels are worth doing for the icons. Saving/loading account data between games doesn't work properly, it will only save icons. Won't properly transfer orbs or stars. Ads every few attempts take away from the game a lot.

Meltdown is probably my least favorite geometry dash game I don't like the songs it's so easy geometry dash subzero gives you a challenge in the game I don't like coin place ments it's still a very good game it's just my least favorite out of the 5 games I'm gonna give it a four star because it was made in 2015 so there were no tiger's in the game and it was the 3rd game of it community so very good game I love it

This game is the best i play it every day but it's not as colourful as the other geometry dash games but there is one problem I have the game doesn't save my progress every time i finished the first level I keep on losing the skin I got by beating that level so if that problem can be fixed i will give 5 stars to this game
very good the only bad thing is the adds

This is a nice experience for a finger exercising game. But the game is very hard itself. As you click, the more you beat. The harder it gets. It gets way to hard that you begin panicking and wanting to delete the app itself. You need tour to help people, and get the hang of it, and it is very far from becoming a Editor's Choice now, you have not been active for a few years, not replying to comments, and expecting 5 star reviews. Let's see what happens if you just stall around for nothing.

Its a fine game if you want to pass the time. The levels are short and there is a practice mode that lets you respawn where you messed up. Only 3 different levels though and two are intermediate. So if you like in depth gameplay and many levels this game is not for you. but it is a good game to play in the car or in line somewhere.
Ads are unbearable, even though I own Geometry Dash, but it's an alright experience, levels are eh, coins are terribly made, but pretty fun, and the music is pretty good.
the game is pretty good but when you play the game it is too dark that I keep on dying👿👿👿👿👿👿. And there are not many worlds you can play in so it gets boring.

star_4.text: Its a good game for those looking to play a bit more GD without paying for the full version! The levels are a bit underwhelming, but it serves as a good time killer, especially when combined with the other games like SubZero. For those worried about the ads, simply turn off your Wifi/data and that issue is solved! Four stars due to a slight lag issue, in which the music unsyncs. The game runs great on an older device, can't speak for newer devices, but overall the game is worth giving a try!

Perfect rhythm game, no WiFi required. RobTop poured their hearts into this. I'm taking points off for 1, the ads (seriously!) 2, only three fairly short songs. If you're interested in trying GD, this is a good place to start, as it's definitely the series' easiest. Besides World. I tried buying the full version, but it won't work for newer devices, sadly. Still a great game, though. Highly recommended.

Fun game, and very challenging. I've found only a few bugs, e.g. delayed reaction to tapping, and once or twice I've jumped on a platform and been teleported straight onto the next hazard and died. Otherwise enjoyable; a few short ads occasionally but you can skip them after approximately 5 seconds, and that's to be expected as it is, after all, a free game. Great game overall!

It's a really fun have but if you want more levels and no ads get the main game. It has easy more levels and you can even make your own! But it does cost like 6$ but it's definitely worth it! Also for some reason there's a glitch where I'm pressing the screen but it doesn't make me jump and it messes the game up. It's really annoying and I would love to see it fixed! Also on occasion there's ads but it's better than some mobile games. That's all my complaints ❤️

So, I'm going to make this look like a good review, this game is alright? Overall the graphics are great! And this game has some unique level design put into it. There maybe some glitches and bug's in the game, but the Controls are a little messed up? Let me explain, I know you only use you're finger but, whenever I try to jump it makes me float for a small amount of time. (3 seconds atleast) But, this game is very addicting none the less! It has quality graphics and, creative platforming. :)

I think this game is amazing!!!! I downloaded all the other geometry dash games but one and that's the one that you have to pay for. I think all of the games are great I just ask that you make that taps more sensitive because sometimes I will tap and it won't register and it gets very frustrating when I'm at 95% and I lose... Please fix and I would gladly put a five star rating! 😁

Awesome game if you want to get bored but sometimes frustrating when you can't get through a certain part of a level but very fun at my opinion would recommend it for people who are looking for fun games with good music.

I honestly love the game but it just has way too few levels and the blue orbs in full version are a reward for making it far in a level but meltdown and subzero don't have them but honestly really quick and easy game to learn to play others
It's a great spinoff to the main game but I think there could be more levels or harder levels. I 100%ed it in about 15 minutes
a cool spinoff of geometry dash! fun levels, cool music and yea, that's it! why 4 stars? cuz that's all there is: there are too few levels
I really like the game and the music is good but I wanna get the airborne robots coin icon on my main account and I don't know how.
This games is really fun to play, but their are a lot of adds after you die. Overall it's a fun game and I like to play.
This game is good, but it has a few levels. I really like the design of each level.
Really great sequel to geometry dash love the game as well as the details and the songs
cool game, I've been playing gd since 2017 and this version of the game has always been good, the only thing that would be better would be more levels
the gameplay and music is awesome but the only downside is that there are only three levels
the game is the easy few ads super fun but it needs more levels
it is very easy and good for go beginners and I think that the ads are not that big of a deal but they can be annoying
geometry dash has been such a cool experience with heaps and heaps of fun (and frustrating moments)
this is a very good game but ,it have very least games about 3 games but it very difficult ,it take time for practice the beast thing is the practice mode👍,very good

star_5.text: I love the game, especially the music. The Seven Seas song is really catchy and makes me not want to die. The level designs are incredible, and every title and song match together so much it should be impossible. Although I do think it is a little too easy, I completed every level on my first try, which means alot of others can too because I'm not very good at it. But as I was saying, amazing game, great music, 5 stars baby!

It really is a great game. You don't even have to buy the full game, it's great as is. There are little glitches here and there during levels that make it so your jumps are delayed, which can be annoying when your about to finish a level (almost got an annurism because of this) but thatight just be my network. Either way, 10/10 game, honestly!

Amazing game, levels are too easy and short, though. I suggest you add more story to it. Just like the full version! The geometry dash series of apps are cool and challenging. Oh, and for the users that rate 1 star because of being horrible at the game, you should install the full version and play it for a while, then maybe youll take back what you said :)

This is a game that I reccomend to everybody. There are the occasional ads but they never bother your playing experience. Once you complete the levels you can unlock skins. You can also complete the objectives which will also give you skins. Some of the objectives you get are from just playing others you get by collecting stuff like coins. Once you do everything you unlock the full version. Have fun playing!

I ❤ this game other ones too! Great job RubRub! You're doing amazing! Make more amazing games like this! I don't like the people that say there's to many ads. I mean theres not that many, and they're not interrupting you're game, so it's fine. I also don't like the people that say the game is too hard, and that practice makes perfect. I've been practicing, and I'm still bad because perfect practice makes perfect. I really reccomend this game, it's really fun and doesn't take up much space.

This game is amazing! There's no bugs, or glitches, if you do get a glitch it's probably your tablet or your phone that is not good on Wi-Fi, the songs are really good! I finished the game ever since I was 8 years old, I downloaded it again and finished it again, you should definitely get this game it's amazing and I love the levels! It's challenging, and I love challenging levels! This game is my favorite [>3<]

It's a great game a whole new level. But there isn't many levels. I can't wait for the new ones. The levels have good beats. But what nuts me is that there are only 3 levels. Lite has way more. It's cool game especially if you want to say to your friends " Hey look what I can do." And if they aren't impressed download SUB zero it is even more challenging.

The reason why I'm giving these 5 stars 🌟 is because we can play different boards which have different music. The board i love the most is Seven Seas it has a really cool beat and the song is so catchy but all in all this game is so much fun so if you don't have geometry dash meltdown or any other Gemotry dash games you should try them. The songs and the titles match up so well with each other. This game is so much fun. I play it sometimes when I get bored on the bus or in the car. I

Its a pretty simple but fun game. its got 3 decent levels all with 3 coins so it creates a challenge and gives you something to do even if you dont have the real version.

it's so much fun, but there are some very very strange bugs in all of the gd games like teloporting into the ground.... my friends play too but the one problem is that my friend's gd frezes all the time.
this game is a great starter for geometry dash, the levels are creative and a great experience. definitely try this game out.

Overall pretty good for a free game the ads are a little annoying but overall good game with plenty to find but not recommended for a long term experience
it's good when you be a level but when the level gets harder do not quit because then you learn how to play geometry dash it's okay if you start crashing out cuz it's fun
